/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libvacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/vacuum_msgs/libvacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vacuum_msgs/msg/_trash_item_s.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vacuum_msgs/msg/_trash_count_s.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vacuum_msgs/msg/_robot_status_s.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vacuum_msgs/msg/_game_state_s.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vacuum_msgs/srv/_collect_trash_s.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vacuum_msgs/srv/_unload_trash_s.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vacuum_msgs/srv/_reset_game_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adam/opk/zadanie2/build/vacuum_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libvacuum_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so libvacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
